news.summary: Mileutis, based in NESS ZIONA, Israel, continues to solidify its position as a frontrunner in the animal health sector with recent appointments. The biopharmaceutical company is renowned for spearheading sustainable practices in the dairy industry and animal health by offering antibiotic and hormone-free solutions. The new appointments reaffirm Mileutis' commitment to innovation and growth in this market segment. The company's dedication to providing cutting-edge solutions has positioned it as a key player in revolutionizing the industry.
news.headline: Mileutis appoints Dr. Hasenmaier and Mr. Schacht to Board, solidifying animal health leadership. Israel, May 7, 2025.

news.summary: In a significant development, the introduction of hosting.com marks a pivotal new phase by bringing together worldwide influence, game-changing resources, and a distinct objective of supporting customers in succeeding online. Recently disclosed in London on May 7, 2025, this milestone represents a monumental shift for the long-established A2 Hosting, a 24-year-old leader in the industry, now rebranded as hosting.com. This move signifies the company's commitment to enhancing its services and offerings in the dynamic online landscape.
news.headline: A2 Hosting rebrands to hosting.com, aiming to be the most trusted in hosting, symbolizing a transformational shift.

news.summary: World Rugby has announced the complete schedule for the Pacific Nations Cup, featuring six teams and three matches taking place at Denver's DICK'S Sporting Goods Park in one exciting day. The event, set for May 7, 2025, is a collaborative effort between World Rugby, USA Rugby, and TEG Rugby Live. This high-energy tournament will showcase top international rugby talent, bringing together teams from different nations for a thrilling display of skill and sportsmanship.
news.headline: Denver to host Pacific Nations Cup 2025 semi-finals, 3 matches with 6 teams, direct path to Men's Rugby World Cup 2027.

news.summary: Over 2,000 students took part in the prestigious engineering design program at The Tech, a renowned center for science, technology, and education in Silicon Valley. The results of the 38th Annual Tech competition were revealed in San Jose, California, showcasing the participation of a large number of students in this event.
news.headline: 2,000+ students showcase gravity-powered devices at The Tech Challenge, San Jose, defying limits in engineering design.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, The Brattle Group announced the addition of Andrew O'Brien-Penney to its Chicago office as a Principal in the Tax Controversy & Transfer Pricing practice. With almost twenty years of experience in guiding clients on intricate transfer pricing matters, Mr. O'Brien-Penney's expertise enhances the firm's capabilities in this area.
news.headline: Transfer pricing expert Andrew O'Brien-Penney joins The Brattle Group in Chicago as Principal, with nearly two decades of experience.

news.summary: In San Antonio on May 7, 2025, over 3,000 stylists, franchisees, and support team members gathered for the annual meeting of Sport Clips Haircuts. The event focused on creating enthusiastic brand advocates and enhancing the haircare experience for men and boys.
news.headline: Sport Clips Haircuts hosts annual National Huddle with 3,000 attendees. Focus on creating "raving fans of the brand."

news.summary: In a groundbreaking move, CATL has introduced the TENER Stack in Munich on May 7, 2025, marking the world's inaugural 9MWh ultra-high capacity energy storage system designed for mass production at ees Europe. This innovative solution combines a large capacity with adaptable transport capabilities, revolutionizing the realm of large-scale energy storage.
news.headline: CATL unveils world's first 9MWh TENER Stack energy storage system for mass production, redefining large-scale storage.

news.summary: The Buona Family, known as a prominent advocate for Chicago's famous sandwich, is currently providing a special offer including a year's worth of free beef, access to iconic Chicago activities, and additional perks. Established in 2015, Buona is a family-operated enterprise recognized for introducing the original Italian beef sandwich in Chicago. The offer includes an opportunity to win tickets for legendary Chicago experiences and a chance to receive a supply of free beef for a full year.
news.headline: Buona celebrates 10th anniversary of National Italian Beef Day on May 24 with free beef for a year and more.

news.summary: Chaberton–Sunscape has finalized its initial project transaction in Italy, reflecting a significant milestone in its expanding portfolio of decentralized solar initiatives throughout the nation. These projects are expected to produce 13.5 gigawatt-hours of renewable energy annually. This output is sufficient to supply electricity to around 5,000 households and will prevent approximately 140,000 units of greenhouse gas emissions.
news.headline: Chaberton-Sunscape completes first sale in Italian solar market, generating 13.5 GWh/year, powering 5,000 homes, avoiding 140,000 tons CO2 emissions.

news.summary: DATAMYTE, a leader in manufacturing technology, is utilizing its DIGITAL CLIPBOARD mobile platform and DATAMYTE GPT Artificial Intelligence System to develop inspection workflows. This innovative approach aims to automate APQP inspection processes that were previously manual. Based in Plymouth, Minnesota, the company is spearheading this initiative as of May 7, 2025.
news.headline: DATAMYTE GPT using AI for mobile inspections, replacing manual APQP processes. Headquarters in Plymouth, Minn.

news.summary: According to recent data, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.8%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. This decrease means that approximately 750,000 individuals who were previously unemployed are now employed. Additionally, the economy has grown by 3.5% in the last quarter, surpassing expectations and marking a significant improvement from the previous year. This growth is attributed to a boost in consumer spending, which has increased by 5% compared to the same time period. Experts predict that if these trends continue, the country's economy will continue to strengthen in the coming months.
news.headline: One vessel, subject to $417M in tariffs due to Trump's trade war.

news.summary: Hain Celestial Group Inc. (NASDAQ: HAIN) saw a decrease in stock prices following the announcement of their third-quarter earnings. The company reported a 11% year-on-year revenue decline for the third quarter of FY25, totaling $390.35 million, falling short of the analyst consensus of $411.62 million. Their adjusted EPS stood at $0.07, missing the expected $0.13. Organic net sales in North America dropped by 10% compared to the previous year, mainly due to reduced sales in snack and baby & kids categories. However, international organic sales saw a 0.5% increase, attributed to growth in meal prep and baby & kids segments as well as improvements in the supply chain from previous service issues. The company's adjusted gross margin for the quarter also saw adjustments.
news.headline: Terra Chips maker Hain Celestial seeks strategic options and announces CEO transition; revenue declined 11% to $390.35 million. Stock tanks as shares trade lower.

news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, Sectigo, a prominent digital certificates and Certificate Lifecycle Management (CLM) provider, revealed their collaboration with Pax8 Marketplace. This partnership brings Sectigo's cloud-based CLM solution, Sectigo Certificate Manager for Partners, to Pax8's extensive network of approximately 40,000 MSPs. It signifies the debut of CLM in this Marketplace. Through this venture, MSPs within the Pax8 ecosystem gain access to Sectigo's automated CLM solution.
news.headline: Sectigo partners with Pax8, offering Certificate Manager to 40,000 MSPs for the first time in a cloud commerce marketplace.

news.summary: Viewers can now observe the impact of the trade war initiated by President Trump as it costs an estimated $417 million in new tariffs on one particular ship. This development underscores the significant financial consequences of the ongoing trade disputes.
news.headline: One vessel hit with $417M in new tariffs amid Trump's trade war.

Flames engulfed aircraft at Yemen’s Sanaa airport after an Israeli airstrike on Houthi targets. The Israeli military carried out the airstrike on Tuesday, its second attack in two days on the Houthis after the group launched a missile attack near Israel's Ben Gurion Airport.

news.summary: The crypto market is experiencing extreme fear as the CoinMarketCap Crypto Fear and Greed Index remains in Fear to Extreme Fear territory for several days. President Donald Trump's tariff surprises are causing further uncertainty in the financial markets. This volatility has led investors to seek alternative income sources, including the popular free cloud mining model. One of the leading platforms in this space is FioBit, offering AI-powered cloud mining with guaranteed daily payouts and no fees. FioBit has been ranked the most profitable cloud mining platform in 2025, utilizing predictive intelligence and global pool allocation for efficient and sustainable mining operations. With a focus on simplicity and high returns, FioBit is setting new standards in the industry by providing a user-friendly entry point for mining various cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Dogecoin, Ethereum, and Litecoin.
news.headline: FioBit excels in cloud mining, offering AI-driven, profitable, and eco-friendly solution for all levels, making passive income effortless.

news.summary: During a hearing with the House Financial Services Committee, U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent advocated for the United States to establish itself as a global leader in digital assets. He emphasized the importance of creating a clear regulatory framework for the crypto industry. Bessent expressed that the U.S. should strive to become the top destination for digital assets, highlighting that Congress is making strides in developing a strong market structure. Appointed to the Treasury position by former President Donald Trump in January, Bessent has been a prominent supporter of integrating crypto into the financial landscape. The full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent supports US becoming global digital assets leader, seeks clear regulatory framework for crypto industry.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, in Jersey City, New Jersey, WallachBeth Capital LLC revealed that bioAffinity Technologies, Inc., a biotechnology firm listed on NASDAQ under the tickers BIAF and BIAFW, is prioritizing the development of noninvasive tests. WallachBeth Capital LLC is known for offering capital markets and institutional execution services.
news.headline: WallachBeth Capital closed a $3.25 million offering for bioAffinity Technologies, a biotech company.

news.summary: The "Strategic Intelligence: Inflation Outlook Executive Briefing (Tenth Edition)" report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report focuses on the potential impact of US tariffs on inflation and the global economy, along with implications for key sectors. Concerns are rising over a potential US recession in 2025 as investors analyze the economic effects of Trump's tariff strategies. Tariffs are being closely watched as a factor in economic contraction.
news.headline: Report on US tariffs' impact on inflation and global economy. Concerns over recession by 2025 as investors assess Trump's policies.

news.summary: In Washington, IPEC and COF have acknowledged five exceptional interprofessional team-based initiatives aimed at improving health outcomes and fostering community involvement.
news.headline: IPEC and COF honor 5 exceptional projects promoting interprofessional collaboration, benefiting health outcomes & community.

news.summary: A new report titled "Decoding US Tariffs' Impact? (Influencers' perception analysis on the new US Trade Tariffs - 2025?)" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report focuses on discussions surrounding US Tariffs among Influencers between March 15 and April 10, 2025. It tracks key increases in activity and changing trends during this period. This analysis delves into the effects of tariff policies on different nations, sectors, and businesses. The report aims to highlight the influence and perceptions of Influencers regarding the new US Trade Tariffs.
news.headline: Report analyzes influencers' perception of US trade tariffs on companies like Tesla, ByteDance, Nike, Ford. Paired from March 15 to April 10, 2025.

news.summary: Sarepta Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: SRPT) announced a loss of $3.42 per share in the first quarter of 2025, missing the analyst estimate of 95 cents. However, the quarterly revenue exceeded expectations, coming in at $744.86 million compared to the consensus estimate of $683.36 million. CEO Doug Ingram acknowledged facing challenges in the quarter and adjusted the company's 2025 guidance to a range of $2.3 billion to $2.6 billion. Despite headwinds in the biotech market, Sarepta remains confident due to its four life-changing therapies, strong revenue, and extensive pipeline. The company has also suspended Elevidys Gene Therapy Trials in Europe following a patient death. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Sarepta Therapeutics (SRPT) stock falls after Q1 2025 miss, $3.42 loss per share, $744.86 million revenue exceeds estimate. 2025 revenue guidance adjusted to $2.3-2.6 billion due to market pressures.

news.summary: InfuSystems Holdings (AMEX: INFU) is set to unveil its quarterly earnings on Thursday, 2025-05-08. Analysts predict the company will post an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.03. Shareholders are eagerly anticipating this update, with hopes of surpassing expectations and receiving optimistic guidance for the following quarter. This news is vital for anyone considering investing in InfuSystems Holdings. Find more comprehensive details on the story at Benzinga.com.
news.headline: InfuSystems Holdings (AMEX: INFU) to report an EPS of $-0.03 on May 8, 2025. Investors eagerly await the announcement for positive guidance.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, at the Knowledge 2025 event, ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW) and Amazon Web Services (AWS) unveiled a new collaboration to assist customers in streamlining enterprise data operations. The innovative solution aims to enhance data integration and workflow orchestration through bi-directional capabilities. As part of the ServiceNow Workflow Data Network ecosystem, this solution will enable real-time data processing. ServiceNow, known as the AI platform for business transformation, continues to drive efficiency in data management with key partners like AWS.
news.headline: ServiceNow and AWS partnership at Knowledge 2025 event introduces bi-directional data integration and workflow orchestration.

news.summary: In the past eight months, CenterPoint has completed the installation of 21,975 durable poles that are more resilient to storms. Additionally, they have undergrounded 401 miles of power lines and incorporated 4,472 automation devices. Moreover, the company has cleared 3,741 miles of high-risk vegetation and set up 84 weather monitoring stations throughout the Greater Houston area.
news.headline: CenterPoint Energy completes 90% of resiliency actions in Houston: 21,975 stronger poles, 401 miles undergrounded, 4,472 automation devices, 3,741 miles cleared, 84 weather stations installed.

news.summary: Valencia-based company Turbo Energy S.A. (Nasdaq: TURB) is currently participating in Intersolar Europe in Munich, Germany from May 7-9, 2025. Intersolar Europe, a renowned solar industry exhibition, typically draws over 110,000 attendees annually, offering a prime platform for networking with industry partners, customers, and stakeholders worldwide. Turbo Energy aims to showcase its innovative SUNBOX energy storage solutions at this event, highlighting its AI-optimized technologies. The exhibition presents a crucial opportunity for Turbo Energy to unveil its latest storage advancements, bolster existing business connections, and further solidify its presence in the global renewable energy sector.
news.headline: Turbo Energy unveils AI-optimized Sunbox energy solutions at Intersolar Europe 2025 in Munich, expecting over 110,000 participants.

news.summary: A total of 227 bridge decks located across different corridors in Indiana underwent aerial infrared thermography (aerial IR) surveys conducted by Infrasense. These assessments provided valuable data on the condition of the bridges, highlighting issues such as overlay debonding and rebar-level delamination quantities which were detected using aerial IR technology. The survey results offered insights into the structural health of the bridges, aiding in identifying areas that may require maintenance or repairs.
news.headline: Infrasense used aerial IR to evaluate 227 Indiana bridge decks, identifying overlay debonding and rebar-level delamination quantities.

Select altcoins are also holding support levels for a possible rally. Bitcoin wallets with 10-10,000 BTC acquired 81,338 BTC in 6 weeks, indicating positive sentiment. ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, ADA, SUI, LINK, and AVAX prices analyzed for potential trends and support/resistance levels. Daily view from Coin360, Bitfinex data, and technical analysis provided. news.summary: A recent report on Qatar's exploration and production highlights a positive outlook for the country's crude oil and condensate production. According to ResearchAndMarkets.com, current development plans project a notable 19% increase in production between 2025 and 2030. This growth is primarily fueled by expansions in Al-Shaheen, the largest oilfield in Qatar. Over the past few years, the field has undergone comprehensive development initiatives amounting to $6 billion, driving the anticipated surge in production levels.
news.headline: Qatar's oil production to increase by 19% between 2025-2030 due to Al-Shaheen field developments - ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, KW has appointed Tim Dieffenbacher as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Stacie Herron as the Chief Operating Officer (COO), while she continues in her role as the Chief Legal Officer (CLO).
news.headline: Keller Williams in Austin, Texas appoints Tim Dieffenbacher as CFO and Stacie Herron as COO alongside CLO role.

news.summary: In Burlingame, California, Quadric® revealed that Kyocera Document Solutions Inc. has obtained licensing for the Chimera™ general purpose neural processor (GPNPU) intellectual property (IP) core. This will be utilized in upcoming office automation system on-chip (SoC) designs. According to Michihiro Okada, Deputy Senior General Manager at Kyocera, the decision was driven by a desire to integrate a highly adaptable and robust AI processing solution into their top-of-the-line document preparation and printing devices.
news.headline: Kyocera partners with Quadric to license Chimera GPNPU AI processor IP for their office automation systems.

news.summary: Ready Capital (NYSE: RC) is set to unveil its quarterly financial results on Thursday, May 8, 2025. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.27 for the company. Investors will be keen to see if Ready Capital surpasses this estimate and provides additional details in their announcement. This information can be found in the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Ready Capital (NYSE: RC) to release earnings on 2025-05-08, expected EPS of $0.27. Investors anticipate favorable results.
